payload.description: MCP/tools/score/scores.py and MCP/tools/item/items.py inline their read logic. Extract that logic into ScoreService.get_info(...) and ItemService.get_info(...) (or equivalent module-level functions) so both the MCP tool registrations and PlexusRuntimeModule.score.info / PlexusRuntimeModule.item.info call the same Python entry point. Then move the runtime module off MCP loopback for these methods with no fallback.
payload.title: Extract plexus.score.info and plexus.item.info into shared service classes
